interface.shortDescription: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is...
interface.longDescription: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
